'''Lis''' was the innermost [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Cirius system/Legends|Cirius system]].<ref name="CatCW" /> A molten, searing rock, it was uninhabitable.

==Sources==
*<!-- 2002-11-07 -->{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20021107caamas|text=Caamas, the Ruined World: ''Coruscant and the Core Worlds'' Preview #1}} {{1stm}}
